title: Naming of City Park
doc_html:
§4712.27. Naming of City Park

            Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority of the city of Lafayette may name City Park in honor of Ernest Nabers Jr.

            Acts 2025, No. 316, §1.
doc_text:
§4712.27.  Naming of City Park
Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the governing authority
of the city of Lafayette may name City Park in honor of Ernest Nabers Jr.
Acts 2025, No. 316, §1.
